case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, VS. FAUSTO GILLARDO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GILLARDO, FAUSTO GILLARDO, JUAN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA GALARDOS MEXICAN RESTAURANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUAL , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA GALARDOS MEXICAN RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILLARDO, FAUSTO GILLARDO, JUAN INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA GALARDOS MEXICAN RESTAURANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUAL , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA GALARDOS MEXICAN RESTAURANT $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
